VOICE_MSG_UNCONFIGURED_NUMBER: This number is not configured for AI assistant service. Goodbye.
VOICE_MSG_QUOTA_EXHAUSTED: Sorry, included voice time for this billing period is used up. You can add more from your dashboard or reply by text message. Goodbye.
VOICE_MSG_AI_BUDGET_EXHAUSTED: Sorry, the owner isn't available right now. Please send us a text message instead and we'll get back to you. Goodbye.
VOICE_MSG_BRIDGE_DEGRADED: Our voice assistant is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later or send a text message. Goodbye.
VOICE_MSG_SYSTEM_ERROR: We could not connect your call. Please try again later. Goodbye.
VOICE_MSG_CONCURRENT_LIMIT: All of our lines are busy right now. Please try again in a few minutes or send a text message. Goodbye.
VOICE_MSG_STREAM_ROLLOUT_DISABLED: AI voice is not available for this call right now. Please send a text message or try again later. Goodbye.
VOICE_MSG_PAUSED: This line is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later. Goodbye.
VOICE_MSG_SAFE_MODE_FORWARD_FAILED: We're sorry, we could not connect your call right now. Please try again later. Goodbye.
SMS_HELP_REPLY: New Coworker: For help, use your business dashboard or contact support. Msg&data rates may apply. Reply STOP to opt out.
SMS_START_REPLY: You're subscribed to New Coworker SMS for this number. Reply STOP to opt out. Msg&data rates may apply.
MESSENGER_OVER_CAP: Sorry — our chat assistant is temporarily unavailable. Please try again a bit later, or contact us directly and we'll be happy to help.
